text:
There used to be a wise old owl that lived in an oak tree. She would watch over the little creatures scuttling through the forest.

One day a sleek fox decided she must own that exquisite fur.

Quietly the fox pursued the owl through the woods. She flew low.

Just before she struck, the wise owl knew the fox.

"Well," she crooked a twig.

The fox didn't know she knew.

"You have a beautiful plumage."

There was a pause.

She saw the surprise.

"You have that in common."

They laughed.

So they flew together every afternoon.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
